title: Softmax rowwise int8 r8 acc24 block
hypothesis: A standalone rowwise int8 softmax block with row_elems=8 and accum_bits=24 can be physically characterized as a bounded circuit_block reference using the existing shift-exp softmax path.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can one standalone int8 rowwise softmax block with higher accumulation precision produce accepted physical implementation metrics as a bounded circuit_block reference?
include: one int8 rowwise softmax r8 acc24 block candidate
one bounded physical sweep on Nangate45
exclude: integrated architecture-block evaluation in the first pass
alternative row widths or scaling families in the first pass
follow_on_broad_sweep: only if the bounded block becomes a useful standalone reference for later mapper or architecture work

expected_benefit: adds one more canonical-path end-to-end proof item under the new docs layout
provides physical timing, area, and power for a small softmax circuit_block variant with higher accumulation precision
risks: this is still a standalone block and may not map directly to later integrated architecture needs
the higher accumulation width may not materially change physical behavior relative to the existing r8 acc20 block

expected_result.reason: the first goal is to obtain accepted physical implementation metrics for one standalone int8 rowwise softmax r8 acc24 block
